SessionStart.prompt:
The ABCA plugin is active. Available skills:
- /setup — first-time setup walkthrough
- /deploy — deploy, diff, or destroy the CDK stack
- /onboard-repo — add a GitHub repository
- /submit-task — submit a coding task (guided or quick mode)
- /troubleshoot — diagnose deployment, auth, or task issues
- /status — platform health check (stack, tasks, build)

Available agents: cdk-expert (CDK infrastructure), agent-debugger (task failure investigation).

Interactive task commands (suggest when user is monitoring or steering a running task):
- bgagent watch <task-id> — stream progress events in real time
- bgagent nudge <task-id> "<message>" — steer the agent mid-run
- bgagent trace download <task-id> — download full execution trace
- bgagent webhook create/list/revoke — manage webhook integrations
- --trace flag on submit — enable detailed tracing for a task
- --verbose flag — HTTP debug output on any command

Suggest relevant skills when the user's request matches.
